key_points: Numbers are used to count, measure and label objects
Natural numbers start from 1 and continue infinitely
Whole numbers include all natural numbers and zero
Integers include positive numbers, negative numbers and zero
Rational numbers can be written in the form p/q where q is not zero
formulas: Rational number form → p/q where q ≠ 0
exam_tips: Remember that natural numbers start from 1
Zero is included in whole numbers but not in natural numbers
Negative numbers are part of integers
Always check that the denominator in a rational number is not zero
